name: tabula-mcp
description: Let Claude work with people in shared Tabula.md Markdown workspaces.
long_description: Turn Markdown created in Claude or local files into shared Tabula.md workspaces. Claude can start or join encrypted live sessions, list, read, search, and write one or many Markdown files, and export fixed encrypted copies. Room and copy keys stay in URL fragments; relays and snapshot storage receive encrypted data.

tools.name: tabula_start_session
tools.description: Start an encrypted live Tabula session from one or more Markdown files.

tools.name: tabula_join_room
tools.description: Join an encrypted live Tabula session from a private #room URL.

tools.name: tabula_list_files
tools.description: List Markdown files and folders in a live session.

tools.name: tabula_read_file
tools.description: Read one Markdown file and its current revision.

tools.name: tabula_search_files
tools.description: Search Markdown paths and contents with line-numbered excerpts.

tools.name: tabula_write_file
tools.description: Create or replace a Markdown file while the server computes the collaboration patch.

tools.name: tabula_write_files
tools.description: Create or replace multiple Markdown files and their folders in one live session transaction.

tools.name: tabula_export_copy
tools.description: Create an encrypted fixed #json copy from Markdown files or a live session.
